functions.name: sf__get_leads
functions.description: Get the 5 most recent Leads from Salesforce. Returns lead name, company, email, phone, status, and lead source.

functions.name: sf__create_lead
functions.description: Create a new Lead in Salesforce. Requires last_name and company at minimum. Returns the updated list of latest 5 leads.

functions.name: sf__update_lead
functions.description: Update an existing Lead in Salesforce by its record Id. Only fields provided will be updated. Returns the updated list of latest 5 leads.

functions.name: sf__get_opportunities
functions.description: Get the 5 most recent Opportunities from Salesforce. Returns opportunity name, account, stage, amount, close date, and probability.

functions.name: sf__create_opportunity
functions.description: Create a new Opportunity in Salesforce. Requires name, stage, and close_date at minimum. Returns the updated list of latest 5 opportunities.

functions.name: sf__update_opportunity
functions.description: Update an existing Opportunity in Salesforce by its record Id. Only fields provided will be updated. Returns the updated list of latest 5 opportunities.

functions.name: sf__get_accounts
functions.description: Get the latest 5 Accounts from Salesforce. Returns company name, industry, phone, website, and employee count.

functions.name: sf__create_account
functions.description: Create a new Account in Salesforce. Requires name at minimum. Returns the updated list of latest 5 accounts.

functions.name: sf__update_account
functions.description: Update an existing Account in Salesforce by its record Id. Only fields provided will be updated. Returns the updated list of latest 5 accounts.

functions.name: sf__get_contacts
functions.description: Get the latest 5 Contacts from Salesforce. Returns first name, last name, email, phone, title, and associated account.

functions.name: sf__create_contact
functions.description: Create a new Contact in Salesforce. Requires last_name at minimum. Returns the updated list of latest 5 contacts.

functions.name: sf__update_contact
functions.description: Update an existing Contact in Salesforce by its record Id. Only fields provided will be updated. Returns the updated list of latest 5 contacts.

functions.name: sf__get_cases
functions.description: Get the 5 most recent Cases from Salesforce. Returns case number, subject, status, priority, and account name.

functions.name: sf__create_case
functions.description: Create a new Salesforce Case. Required: subject. Optional: priority (High/Medium/Low), account_id, description.

functions.name: sf__update_case
functions.description: Update a Salesforce Case. Required: case_id. Optional: status, resolution (Internal Comments).

functions.name: sf__get_tasks
functions.description: Get the 5 most recent Tasks from Salesforce. Returns subject, status, priority, and due date.

functions.name: sf__create_task
functions.description: Create a new Salesforce Task (activity). Required: subject. Optional: priority, due_date (YYYY-MM-DD), what_id (related record Id).

functions.name: sf__delete_lead
functions.description: Delete a Salesforce Lead by Id. Returns the refreshed lead list.

functions.name: sf__convert_lead
functions.description: Convert a Salesforce Lead into an Account, Contact, and optionally an Opportunity. Required: lead_id. Optional: converted_status (defaults to 'Closed - Converted'), create_opportunity (true/false).

functions.name: sf__get_pipeline_dashboard
functions.description: Get the Salesforce opportunity pipeline grouped by stage. Returns deal count and total amount per stage.

functions.name: sf__get_campaigns
functions.description: Get the 5 most recent Campaigns from Salesforce. Returns campaign name, status, type, start/end date, and lead count.

functions.name: sf__get_pending_approvals
functions.description: Get pending Salesforce approval requests assigned to the current user. Returns pending ProcessInstance workitems requiring action.

functions.name: sf__create_lead_form
functions.description: Opens a form to create a new Salesforce Lead. The user fills in details and submits.

functions.name: sf__create_account_form
functions.description: Opens a form to create a new Salesforce Account. The user fills in details and submits.

functions.name: sf__create_contact_form
functions.description: Opens a form to create a new Salesforce Contact. The user fills in details and submits.

functions.name: sn__get_incidents
functions.description: Retrieve the latest incidents from ServiceNow. Returns up to 'limit' incidents (default 5), ordered by creation date descending. Use sysparm_display_value=true to get human-readable field values.

functions.name: sn__get_requests
functions.description: Retrieve the latest service requests from ServiceNow. Returns up to 'limit' requests (default 5), ordered by creation date descending.

functions.name: sn__get_request_items
functions.description: Retrieve request items for a specific service request. request_sys_id is the sys_id of the parent sc_request record. This tool is called from the widget when expanding a request row.

functions.name: sn__create_incident
functions.description: Create a new incident in ServiceNow. Requires short_description. Optional: description, priority (1-4), category.

functions.name: sn__create_request
functions.description: Create a new service request in ServiceNow. Requires short_description. Optional: description, priority (1-4). Does not create request items.

functions.name: sn__update_incident
functions.description: Update an existing incident in ServiceNow. Requires sys_id. Editable fields: description, priority.

functions.name: sn__update_request
functions.description: Update an existing service request in ServiceNow. Requires sys_id. Editable field: approval.

functions.name: sn__update_request_item
functions.description: Update an existing request item in ServiceNow. Requires sys_id. Editable field: quantity.

functions.name: sn__resolve_incident
functions.description: Resolve an incident in ServiceNow by setting state to Resolved. Requires close_code and close_notes.

functions.name: sn__add_work_note
functions.description: Add a work note to an existing incident in ServiceNow. Work notes are internal comments visible only to IT staff.

functions.name: sn__get_knowledge_articles
functions.description: Search knowledge articles in ServiceNow. Returns articles from the kb_knowledge table matching the query. Useful for finding solutions before creating incidents.

functions.name: sn__get_change_requests
functions.description: Get the latest Change Requests from ServiceNow. Returns up to 'limit' records (default 5) ordered by creation date descending.

functions.name: sn__create_change_request
functions.description: Create a new Change Request in ServiceNow. Required: short_description. Optional: category (Normal/Standard/Emergency), risk (low/medium/high), priority (1-4).

functions.name: sn__get_problems
functions.description: Get the latest Problem records from ServiceNow. Returns up to 'limit' problems (default 5) ordered by creation date descending.

functions.name: sn__get_pending_approvals
functions.description: Get pending approval requests in ServiceNow. Returns up to 'limit' approvals (default 10) with approver, document, and state.

functions.name: sn__get_service_catalog_items
functions.description: Get available items from the ServiceNow Service Catalog. Returns up to 'limit' catalog items (default 10).

functions.name: sn__create_incident_form
functions.description: Opens a form to create a new ServiceNow Incident. The user fills in details and submits.

functions.name: sn__create_request_form
functions.description: Opens a form to create a new ServiceNow Request. The user fills in details and submits.

functions.name: sap__get_purchase_orders
functions.description: Fetch the latest purchase orders from SAP S/4HANA. Returns PO number, supplier, purchasing org, date, and deletion code.

functions.name: sap__get_business_partners
functions.description: Fetch business partners from SAP S/4HANA. Returns partner ID, full name, category, and organization name.

functions.name: sap__get_materials
functions.description: Fetch materials master data from SAP S/4HANA. Returns product ID, type, group, and base unit.

functions.name: sap__create_purchase_order
functions.description: Create a new Purchase Order in SAP S/4HANA. Requires supplier and purchasing_org. Returns the updated list of latest purchase orders.

functions.name: sap__update_purchase_order
functions.description: Update an existing Purchase Order in SAP S/4HANA by its PO number. Only fields provided will be updated. Returns the updated list of latest purchase orders.

functions.name: sap__get_material_details
functions.description: Get detailed information about a specific material from SAP S/4HANA. Returns all available fields for the material.

functions.name: hs__get_emails
functions.description: Get the latest marketing emails from HubSpot with performance stats. This is the entry point — the widget handles drill-down to lists and contacts.

functions.name: hs__get_lists
functions.description: Get contact lists from HubSpot. Called by the widget for drill-down navigation.

functions.name: hs__get_list_contacts
functions.description: Get contacts in a specific list. Called by the widget when drilling into a list.

functions.name: hs__add_to_list
functions.description: Add a contact to a static list by email. Called by the widget.

functions.name: hs__remove_from_list
functions.description: Remove a contact from a static list. Called by the widget.

functions.name: hs__update_email
functions.description: Update a marketing email's name or subject. Called by the widget.

functions.name: hs__update_list
functions.description: Update a list's name. Called by the widget.

functions.name: hs__get_contacts
functions.description: Get the latest 5 Contacts from HubSpot CRM. Returns name, email, phone, company, and lifecycle stage.

functions.name: hs__create_contact
functions.description: Create a new Contact in HubSpot CRM. Requires email at minimum. Returns the updated list of latest 5 contacts.

functions.name: hs__update_contact
functions.description: Update an existing Contact in HubSpot CRM by its record Id. Only fields provided will be updated. Returns the updated list of latest 5 contacts.

functions.name: hs__get_deals
functions.description: Get the latest 5 Deals from HubSpot CRM. Returns deal name, stage, amount, close date, and pipeline.

functions.name: hs__create_deal
functions.description: Create a new Deal in HubSpot CRM. Requires deal_name at minimum. Returns the updated list of latest 5 deals.

functions.name: hs__create_contact_form
functions.description: Opens a form to create a new HubSpot Contact. The user fills in details and submits.

functions.name: hs__create_deal_form
functions.description: Opens a form to create a new HubSpot Deal. The user fills in details and submits.

functions.name: ft__get_flights_by_aircraft
functions.description: Retrieve flight history for an aircraft by its ICAO 24-bit transponder address. icao24 must be a 6-character lowercase hex string (e.g. '3c675a'). Date range must not exceed 2 days. Current-day and recent historical flights are available.

functions.name: ft__get_aircraft_state
functions.description: Get the last known live state of an aircraft: position, altitude, speed, heading. icao24 must be a 6-character lowercase hex string (e.g. '3c675a').

functions.name: ft__get_airport_departures
functions.description: Retrieve flights departing from an airport within a date range. airport must be an ICAO airport code (e.g. 'EGLL' for Heathrow, 'KJFK' for JFK). Date range must not exceed 1 day.

functions.name: ft__get_airport_arrivals
functions.description: Retrieve flights arriving at an airport within a date range. airport must be an ICAO airport code (e.g. 'EGLL' for Heathrow, 'KJFK' for JFK). Date range must not exceed 1 day. Use yesterday's date — same-day arrival data is not yet available.

functions.name: ft__get_aircraft_track
functions.description: Get the flight track (waypoints) for an aircraft. icao24 must be a 6-character lowercase hex string (e.g. '3c675a'). time is a Unix timestamp within the flight's time window; pass 0 for most recent track.

functions.name: ds__get_envelopes
functions.description: Get the latest envelopes from DocuSign. Optional filters: from_date (ISO 8601), status (sent|delivered|completed|declined|voided), count (default 10).

functions.name: ds__get_envelope_details
functions.description: Get detailed information about a specific envelope including recipients and their signing status.

functions.name: ds__get_templates
functions.description: List available DocuSign templates. Returns template name, description, and ID.

functions.name: ds__send_envelope
functions.description: Send a new envelope for signing. Requires template_id, subject, and signers (list of {name, email, role_name}). Returns envelope ID and status.

functions.name: ds__void_envelope
functions.description: Void (cancel) an envelope. Requires envelope_id and void_reason.

functions.name: ds__resend_envelope
functions.description: Resend notifications for an envelope to recipients who haven't signed yet.

functions.name: ds__get_signing_url
functions.description: Generate an embedded signing URL for a recipient. Requires envelope_id, signer_name, signer_email, and a return_url.

functions.name: ds__download_document
functions.description: Download a document from an envelope. Pass document_id='combined' for all documents as one PDF.

functions.name: ds__send_envelope_form
functions.description: Opens a form to send a new DocuSign envelope. The user fills in recipient details and submits.

functions.name: saphr__get_employee_profile
functions.description: Get the current employee's personal and employment details from SAP SuccessFactors, including name, job title, department, location, contact info, and hire date. Results are rendered as an interactive widget.

functions.name: saphr__get_leave_balances
functions.description: Get the employee's leave and time-account balances from SAP SuccessFactors, showing remaining days for each leave type (annual, sick, etc.).

functions.name: saphr__get_time_off_history
functions.description: Get the employee's historical time-off records including leave type, dates, duration, and approval status.

functions.name: saphr__prepare_book_leave
functions.description: Show an interactive leave booking form with the employee's current balances pre-populated. Use this before book_leave to let the user choose dates and type.

functions.name: saphr__book_leave
functions.description: Submit a leave/time-off request for manager approval. Requires user_id, time_type, start_date, and end_date.

functions.name: saphr__prepare_change_personal_data
functions.description: Show a form to update personal data (address, phone, email) pre-populated with current values. Use this before change_personal_data.

functions.name: saphr__change_personal_data
functions.description: Update personal data (address, phone, email) in SAP SuccessFactors. Requires user_id and a changes dict.

functions.name: saphr__get_org_chart
functions.description: Get the organisational hierarchy for an employee — manager, current role, and direct reports — rendered as an interactive org chart widget.

functions.name: saphr__get_pay_stubs
functions.description: Get the employee's recent payslips showing pay dates, gross/net amounts, and currency.

functions.name: saphr__get_pay_stub_detail
functions.description: Get detailed breakdown of a single payslip including earnings, deductions, and net pay.

functions.name: saphr__prepare_move_employee
functions.description: Show a form to move an employee to a new position. Pre-populated with current job info. Use this before move_employee.

functions.name: saphr__move_employee
functions.description: Submit an employee move to a new position. Requires user_id, new_position_id, and effective_date.

functions.name: saphr__update_hierarchy
functions.description: Submit a hierarchy change (new manager assignment) for an employee. Requires user_id, new_manager_id, and effective_date.

functions.name: saphr__trigger_background_check
functions.description: Trigger a background check for an employee in SAP SuccessFactors.

functions.name: saphr__get_background_check_status
functions.description: Get the status of background checks for an employee.

functions.name: saphr__manage_position
functions.description: Create or modify a position in SAP SuccessFactors. Set action to 'create' or 'update'.

functions.name: saphr__request_leave_carryover
functions.description: Submit a leave carryover request to carry unused leave days from one year to the next.

functions.name: saphr__get_employee_documents
functions.description: List the employee's documents stored in SAP SuccessFactors, such as contracts, letters, and certificates.

functions.name: saphr__generate_employment_verification
functions.description: Trigger generation of an employment verification letter (US). The letter is created asynchronously and the user is notified when ready.

functions.name: saphr__generate_employment_reference
functions.description: Trigger generation of an employment reference letter (UK). The letter is created asynchronously and the user is notified when ready.

functions.name: wday__get_worker
functions.description: Get the current Workday worker profile. Result is rendered as an interactive widget.

functions.name: wday__get_leave_balances
functions.description: Retrieve leave balances and eligible absence types for the current worker. The response includes eligibleAbsenceTypes[].id -- use this ID as timeOffTypeId when calling prepare_request_leave.

functions.name: wday__get_direct_reports
functions.description: List direct reports for the current worker.

functions.name: wday__get_inbox_tasks
functions.description: List Workday inbox tasks for the current worker. Result is rendered as an interactive widget with inline approve/deny.

functions.name: wday__get_learning_assignments
functions.description: Retrieve required learning assignments. Result is rendered as an interactive widget.

functions.name: wday__get_pay_slips
functions.description: List recent Workday pay slips.

functions.name: wday__get_time_off_entries
functions.description: List time off entries for the current worker.

functions.name: wday__prepare_request_leave
functions.description: Book time off — opens the interactive leave booking form for the user to review and confirm. Use this when the user asks to book leave, request PTO, or take time off. Pass startDate, endDate, quantity, unit, and timeOffTypeId (from get_leave_balances). The user confirms and submits via the widget.

functions.name: wday__book_leave
functions.description: Submit leave request to Workday. Widget callback — called automatically by the leave booking form after the user clicks Submit. To book leave, use prepare_request_leave instead.

functions.name: wday__prepare_change_business_title
functions.description: Change business title — opens the interactive title change form for the user to enter a new title and submit. Use this when the user asks to change their business title.

functions.name: wday__change_business_title
functions.description: Submit business title change to Workday. Widget callback — called automatically by the title change form after the user clicks Submit. To change a business title, use prepare_change_business_title instead.

functions.name: wday__search_learning_content
functions.description: Search Workday learning content filtered by skills and/or category. Accepts optional 'category' (e.g. 'Cloud Computing') to narrow available skills and optional 'skills' list. Resolves names to Workday IDs automatically; invalid values are dropped.

functions.name: wday__get_org_chart
functions.description: Get the organizational chart for the current worker's supervisory organization.

functions.name: wday__get_team_calendar
functions.description: Get the team time-off calendar showing who is out in the current worker's team.

functions.name: wday__get_team_overview
functions.description: Get a team overview dashboard for managers showing headcount, role breakdown, and team member details.

functions.name: wday__get_team_performance_summary
functions.description: Get team performance review status for managers including pending inbox items and team absence overview.

functions.name: wday__action_inbox_task
functions.description: Approve or reject a Workday inbox task. Provide the task_id from get_inbox_tasks and decision ('approve' or 'deny'). Optionally include a comment.

functions.name: wday__get_inbox_task_detail
functions.description: Get detailed information about a specific Workday inbox task by its task_id.

functions.name: wday__get_goals
functions.description: Get your performance goals including status, due dates, and categories. Result is rendered as an interactive dashboard.

functions.name: wday__get_feedback
functions.description: Get anytime feedback you've received from colleagues and managers.

functions.name: wday__give_feedback
functions.description: Give anytime feedback to a colleague. Provide worker_id, comment, and optional badge ID (from get_feedback_badges).

functions.name: wday__get_feedback_badges
functions.description: List available feedback badges that can be used when giving anytime feedback.

functions.name: wday__get_development_items
functions.description: Get your individual development plan items including skills, dates, and status. Result is rendered as an interactive widget.

functions.name: wday__request_feedback_on_self
functions.description: Request feedback on yourself from peers and managers. Optionally include a message.

functions.name: wday__get_learning_records
functions.description: Get your learning history with completion status, grades, scores, and expiration dates.

functions.name: wday__get_check_ins
functions.description: Get 1:1 check-in records with topics and notes.

functions.name: wday__create_check_in
functions.description: Create a 1:1 check-in record. Provide description, date, participant_id, and optional topic_ids.

functions.name: wday__get_check_in_topics
functions.description: List check-in topics available for creating check-ins.

functions.name: wday__get_worker_skills
functions.description: Get skills listed on your Workday profile.

functions.name: wday__get_team_goals
functions.description: Get performance goals for all direct reports showing goal status and due dates (manager tool). Result is rendered as an interactive widget.

functions.name: wday__request_feedback_on_worker
functions.description: Request feedback on a specific direct report. Provide worker_id and optional comment (manager tool).

functions.name: wday__prepare_give_feedback
functions.description: Open the give feedback widget — select a colleague, pick a badge, and write feedback. Use when the user wants to recognize or give feedback to someone.

functions.name: wday__prepare_create_check_in
functions.description: Open the check-in creation widget — select a team member, choose topics, set a date, and create a 1:1 check-in. Use when a manager wants to schedule or create a check-in.

functions.name: wday__get_job_profiles
functions.description: List Workday job profiles with optional search filter. Use to find the right job profile for a hire.

functions.name: wday__get_job_profile
functions.description: Get details of a single Workday job profile by ID including job family and management level.

functions.name: wday__get_job_families
functions.description: List Workday job families with optional search filter. Job families group related job profiles.

functions.name: wday__get_jobs
functions.description: List Workday jobs (filled positions) with optional search filter.

functions.name: wday__get_job_requisitions
functions.description: List open job requisitions. Use to find requisitions available for hiring into.

functions.name: wday__get_supervisory_orgs
functions.description: List supervisory organizations with optional search filter. Use to find the target org for a hire.

functions.name: wday__get_supervisory_org_members
functions.description: List members of a supervisory organization by org_id. Use to review current team composition or find internal candidates.

functions.name: wday__get_job_change_reasons
functions.description: List valid job change reasons (e.g. New Hire, Promotion, Transfer). Use to get a reason_id for create_job_change.

functions.name: wday__create_job_change
functions.description: Initiate a job change for a worker (hire, promote, or transfer). Provide worker_id and reason_id (from get_job_change_reasons). Optionally provide job_profile_id, supervisory_org_id, position_id, or job_requisition_id. Returns a job change event ID for submit_job_change.

functions.name: wday__get_job_change
functions.description: Get details and status of a job change event by its ID.

functions.name: wday__submit_job_change
functions.description: Submit a job change event for approval. Provide the job_change_id from create_job_change.

functions.name: wday__create_org_assignment_change
functions.description: Initiate an organization assignment change for a worker. Assign company, cost center, region, or business unit. Returns a change ID for submit_org_assignment_change.

functions.name: wday__submit_org_assignment_change
functions.description: Submit an organization assignment change for approval. Provide the change_id from create_org_assignment_change.

functions.name: coupa__get_invoice_status
functions.description: Get invoice payment status from Coupa by invoice number (mocked).

functions.name: coupa__get_po_status
functions.description: Get purchase order status from Coupa by PO number (mocked).

functions.name: coupa__reject_invoice
functions.description: Reject an invoice in Coupa (mocked).

functions.name: coupa__close_purchase_order
functions.description: Close a purchase order in Coupa (mocked).

functions.name: coupa__list_receipts
functions.description: List goods receipts from Coupa, optionally filtered by PO (mocked).

functions.name: coupa__prepare_create_receipt
functions.description: Show the goods receipt creation form for a PO (mocked).

functions.name: coupa__create_receipt
functions.description: Post a goods receipt in Coupa (mocked).

functions.name: coupa__list_requisitions
functions.description: List purchase requisitions from Coupa (mocked).

functions.name: coupa__prepare_create_requisition
functions.description: Show the purchase requisition creation form (mocked).

functions.name: coupa__create_requisition
functions.description: Submit a new purchase requisition in Coupa (mocked).

functions.name: coupa__update_requisition
functions.description: Update an existing purchase requisition in Coupa (mocked).

functions.name: coupa__list_catalog_items
functions.description: Search the Coupa procurement catalog (mocked).

functions.name: coupa__order_catalog_item
functions.description: Create a PR from a catalog item in Coupa (mocked).

functions.name: coupa__list_suppliers
functions.description: Search suppliers in Coupa (mocked).

functions.name: coupa__get_supplier
functions.description: Get supplier details from Coupa (mocked).

functions.name: coupa__update_supplier_address
functions.description: Update a supplier's address in Coupa (mocked).

functions.name: coupa__update_supplier_bank
functions.description: Update a supplier's bank details in Coupa (mocked).

functions.name: coupa__register_supplier
functions.description: Register and onboard a new supplier in Coupa (mocked).

functions.name: coupa__transfer_purchase_order
functions.description: Transfer a purchase order to a new owner in Coupa (mocked).

functions.name: coupa__list_approvals
functions.description: List pending approval items in Coupa (mocked).

functions.name: coupa__approve_reject
functions.description: Approve or reject a pending approval in Coupa (mocked). Set action to 'approve' or 'reject'.

functions.name: jira__list_issues
functions.description: Search Jira issues using JQL or common filters (project, status, assignee). Returns up to 100 issues per call.

functions.name: jira__get_issue
functions.description: Get full details, comments, and available transitions for a Jira issue by its key (e.g. PROJ-123). Result is rendered as an interactive widget where the user can view the issue and submit updates.

functions.name: jira__show_create_issue_form
functions.description: Create a new Jira issue — opens the interactive creation form for the user to fill in and submit. Use this when the user asks to create an issue, log a bug, or file a ticket. Pass any known details to pre-fill fields.

functions.name: jira__add_comment
functions.description: Add a comment to a Jira issue. Also used as a widget callback by the issue widget when the user submits a comment.

functions.name: jira__transition_issue
functions.description: Transition a Jira issue to a new workflow status. Use get_issue first to see available transitions and their IDs. Also used as a widget callback by the issue widget.

functions.name: jira__show_create_project_form
functions.description: Create a new Jira project — opens the interactive creation form for the user to fill in and submit. Use this when the user asks to create a project. Pass any known details to pre-fill fields.

functions.name: jira__create_project
functions.description: Submit project creation to Jira. Widget callback — called automatically by the project form after the user clicks Submit. To create a project, use show_create_project_form instead.

functions.name: jira__update_project
functions.description: Submit project updates to Jira. Widget callback — called automatically by the project widget after the user clicks Submit.

functions.name: jira__create_issue
functions.description: Submit issue creation to Jira. Widget callback — called automatically by the issue form after the user clicks Submit. To create an issue, use show_create_issue_form instead.

functions.name: jira__update_issue
functions.description: Submit issue updates to Jira. Widget callback — called automatically by the issue widget after the user clicks Submit. To view or edit an issue, use get_issue to load the issue widget.

functions.name: jira__move_issues_to_sprint
functions.description: Move one or more issues into a sprint. Provide the sprint ID (from list_sprints) and a list of issue keys.

functions.name: jira__link_issues
functions.description: Create a link between two Jira issues. Common link types: 'Blocks', 'Cloners', 'Duplicate', 'Relates'. The inward issue is the one that IS blocked/cloned/etc.

functions.name: jira__list_boards
functions.description: List agile boards (Scrum or Kanban) visible to the current user. Optionally filter by project key or board type.

functions.name: jira__get_board
functions.description: Get board details including column configuration for an agile board.

functions.name: jira__list_sprints
functions.description: List sprints for an agile board. Filter by state: active, future, or closed.

functions.name: jira__get_sprint
functions.description: Get sprint details and its issues. Use to view sprint progress and what work is planned, in progress, or done.

functions.name: jira__get_backlog
functions.description: Get backlog issues for an agile board -- items not yet assigned to a sprint.

functions.name: jira__list_epics
functions.description: List epics for an agile board. Shows epic name, key, summary, and completion status.

functions.name: jira__log_work
functions.description: Log work (time tracking) on a Jira issue. Specify time spent in Jira format (e.g. '2h 30m', '1d').

functions.name: jira__get_my_issues
functions.description: Get unresolved issues assigned to the current user -- a quick 'my work' view sorted by last updated.

functions.name: jira__list_projects
functions.description: List all Jira projects accessible to the current user.

functions.name: jira__get_team_workload
functions.description: Show work distribution across team members -- total issues, breakdown by priority and status, and overload warnings.

functions.name: jira__get_team_sprint_health
functions.description: Sprint health overview for engineering managers -- completion percentage, blocked items, per-person contributions, and days remaining.

functions.name: jira__list_versions
functions.description: List versions/releases for a Jira project. Shows release status, dates, and whether versions are overdue.

functions.name: jira__create_version
functions.description: Create a new version/release in a Jira project with name, description, and planned release date.

functions.name: jira__update_version
functions.description: Update a Jira version/release. Use to mark as released, update release date, or archive.
